name: usage-guard
description: Callback-only Codex usage guard with failed-redeem emergency handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Check Codex usage after each turn.
interface.longDescription: Usage Guard reads structured Codex token_count events from lifecycle hooks, attempts a configured reset-credit redeem at 97%, and starts handoff.org if that redeem failed and usage later exceeds 98%. It runs without a daemon or polling loop.
interface.defaultPrompt: Inspect Usage Guard status and recent alerts.
